reasoning: The control RA-5 (5) focuses on vulnerability monitoring and scanning with an emphasis on privileged access. In Kubernetes, this maps to ensuring that images are scanned for vulnerabilities before deployment (k8s_image_vulnerability_scanning_enabled), controlling privileged access through admission controllers (k8s_admission_controller_privileged_access_deny), and enforcing least privilege in RBAC configurations (k8s_rbac_least_privilege_enforcement). These checks collectively address the requirement for monitoring vulnerabilities and managing privileged access.
title: Vulnerability Monitoring and Scanning | Privileged Access
